overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a driving simulator showing nighttime highway driving during a heavy thunderstorm. The player follows and overtakes a large truck while navigating through moderate traffic with active windshield wipers and frequent lightning illuminating the rainy scene.

agents.ego_description: following a large white truck at high speed with windshield wipers active and hands on the steering wheel

notable_agents.action: large white box truck driving ahead in the same lane with brake lights occasionally visible

entered.detail: large white commercial box truck with red taillights driving ahead
metal highway guardrail running parallel to the left side of the road
metal highway guardrail on the right side of the multi-lane highway
tall street light poles with orange sodium vapor lights illuminating the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving on a multi-lane highway at night during a heavy rainstorm, following closely behind a large white box truck. The windshield wipers sweep rhythmically across the glass as overhead street lights cast an orange glow on the wet asphalt road.

events.description: steering left to begin overtaking the large truck in the left lane
bright lightning strike flashes across the dark sky ahead
completing the overtake of the large truck and merging ahead of it

agents.ego_description: overtaking the large truck on the left side and merging back into the right lane ahead of it

notable_agents.action: large white truck being passed on the right side, gradually falling behind

entered.detail: white sedan visible in the distance ahead after completing the overtake

segments.scene_description: The driver signals and moves into the left lane to overtake the large white truck. As the vehicle pulls ahead, a brilliant flash of lightning illuminates the stormy sky, revealing the truck's side before it recedes into the right lane behind.

events.description: multiple lightning strikes illuminate the clouds and road ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed in the left lane with reduced visibility from heavy rain and wind

notable_agents.action: white sedan traveling ahead in the same lane at consistent speed

entered.detail: faint glow of city lights visible on the horizon through the rain

segments.scene_description: Cruising in the left lane with the truck now far behind, the vehicle approaches a white sedan ahead. The storm intensifies with bright lightning flashes illuminating the dark clouds, and distant city lights become visible on the horizon through the rain-slicked windshield.

events.description: passing a blue sedan on the right side of the vehicle
passing an orange car and red container truck on the right shoulder area

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic and passing slower vehicles on the right side

notable_agents.action: blue sedan being overtaken on the right side in the slow lane
orange car parked or moving slowly on the right shoulder near a red container

entered.detail: blue sedan in the right lane being passed
orange vehicle on the right side near the guardrail
large red shipping container or barrier on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle encounters denser traffic, overtaking a blue sedan and then an orange car near a red shipping container on the right side. The rain continues to pour heavily as the driver maneuvers through the moderate traffic flow on the wet highway.

events.description: approaching emergency vehicle with flashing red and blue lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing at speed while approaching an emergency vehicle with active flashing lights in the distance

notable_agents.action: emergency vehicle with flashing red and blue lights stopped or moving slowly ahead

entered.detail: police car or ambulance with flashing red and blue emergency lights

segments.scene_description: In the final stretch, the vehicle approaches an emergency vehicle with flashing red and blue lights visible ahead through the heavy rain. The driver maintains course on the wet highway as the storm continues with occasional lightning flashes reflecting off the slick road surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a nighttime highway drive that evolves from following a single vehicle into navigating through denser, storm-lashed traffic. It begins closely behind a large white box truck under the orange glow of street lights, with windshield wipers sweeping rhythmically across the rain-streaked glass. As the vehicle signals and pulls into the left lane to overtake the truck, a brilliant flash of lightning illuminates the stormy sky and the wet asphalt. The scene then opens up as the truck recedes, shifting toward a distant horizon of city lights and intensifying lightning flashes while the driver passes a white sedan. Finally, the camera maneuvers through a denser flow of traffic, overtaking blue and orange cars near a red shipping container before approaching the flashing red and blue lights of an emergency vehicle ahead.
